nasb.text: On account of the sin of their mouth and the words of their lips, Let them even be caught in their pride, And on account of curses and lies which they utter.

esv.text: For the sin of their mouths, the words of their lips, let them be trapped in their pride. For the cursing and lies that they utter,

cnv.text: 因他們口中的罪， 因他們嘴裡所說的話， 願他們在自己的驕傲中被纏住。 因他們所說的是咒罵和欺騙的話，

ccb.text: 他们的嘴巴充满罪恶， 口中尽是咒诅和谎言， 愿他们陷在狂傲中不能自拔。

csbs.text: 愿他们因口中的罪和嘴上的话， 在自己的骄傲中被缠住； 因为他们所说的都是诅咒和谎言。
